title: 1 step DFU - User can trigger firmware update for just earbuds
scenario: Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds firmware update completes independently without updating the charging case firmware
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure both the Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds and the charging case are connected and on firmware version 5039 or higher.
3. From the Home screen, navigate to Settings → Update.
4. Tap the Update button to check for available firmware updates.
5. On the firmware update screen, locate the section for the earbuds and tap the Update button specifically for the earbuds.
6. Wait for the earbuds firmware update process to complete.
expected: Only the earbuds DFU (Device Firmware Update) completes successfully. The charging case remains on the lower firmware version (5039 or higher, unchanged).
